title: Good outbox pattern — transactional event publishing with DB atomicity
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements the outbox pattern for atomic event publishing. DB write and event record are in a single transaction — if either fails, both roll back. The outbox relay publishes asynchronously with at-least-once guarantee (re-reads unsent rows on restart). This avoids the dual-write problem (db.Save + kafka.Produce is NOT atomic).
